mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_buys ( user_seq, creator_type, partner_name, item_name, category, group_name, description, target_participants, current_participants, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, end_date, pickup_location, pickup_time, notice, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userSeq}, #{creatorType}, #{partnerName}, #{itemName}, #{category}, #{groupName}, #{description}, #{targetParticipants}, 1, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalAmount}, #{endDate}, #{pickupLocation}, #{pickupTime}, #{notice}, 'RECRUITING', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT group_buy_seq AS groupBuySeq, user_seq AS userSeq, creator_type AS creatorType, partner_name AS partnerName, item_name AS itemName, category, group_name AS groupName, description, target_participants AS targetParticipants, current_participants AS currentParticipants, quantity, unit_price AS unitPrice, total_amount AS totalAmount, end_date AS endDate, pickup_location AS pickupLocation, pickup_time AS pickupTime, notice, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM group_buys
user_seq = #{userSeq}
AND group_buy_seq IN ( SELECT group_buy_seq FROM group_buy_participants WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} )
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT g.group_buy_seq AS groupBuySeq, g.user_seq AS userSeq, g.creator_type AS creatorType, g.partner_name AS partnerName, g.item_name AS itemName, g.category, g.group_name AS groupName, g.description, g.target_participants AS targetParticipants, g.current_participants AS currentParticipants, g.quantity, g.unit_price AS unitPrice, g.total_amount AS totalAmount, g.end_date AS endDate, g.pickup_location AS pickupLocation, g.pickup_time AS pickupTime, g.notice, g.status, g.created_at AS createdAt, p.payment_status AS paymentStatus, p.delivery_status AS deliveryStatus FROM group_buys g JOIN group_buy_participants p ON g.group_buy_seq = p.group_buy_seq WHERE p.user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT group_buy_seq AS groupBuySeq, user_seq AS userSeq, creator_type AS creatorType, partner_name AS partnerName, item_name AS itemName, category, group_name AS groupName, description, target_participants AS targetParticipants, current_participants AS currentParticipants, quantity, unit_price AS unitPrice, total_amount AS totalAmount, end_date AS endDate, pickup_location AS pickupLocation, pickup_time AS pickupTime, notice, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM group_buys WHERE group_buy_seq = #{groupBuySeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE group_buys SET current_participants = current_participants + 1 WHERE group_buy_seq = #{groupBuySeq} AND current_participants < target_participants AND status = 'RECRUITING'
mapper.select: SELECT p.user_seq AS userSeq, s.company_name AS companyName, s.address1, s.address2, s.ceo_name AS ceoName, p.payment_status AS paymentStatus, p.delivery_status AS deliveryStatus FROM group_buy_participants p JOIN users u ON p.user_seq = u.user_seq JOIN stores s ON u.user_seq = s.user_seq WHERE p.group_buy_seq = #{groupBuySeq}
